magnet.title: The Warmth of the Rainbow
magnet.successMessage: Pascal changed the dark colors of Darth Vader's heart. The lord of darkness finally laid down his saber and smiled.
magnet.solvedLabel: Darth Vader found a new friend

scramble.title: The Link of the Lost
scramble.successMessage: The lost letters have found their place… A new key is forged in the light.

vibration.title: The Invisible Whisper
vibration.successMessage: The whisper has fallen silent… but its secret still resonates. A key is born from silence.

ink.title: The Revealing Ink
ink.successMessage: The ink has revealed everything. The words traced in shadow now shine in your memory.
ink.introText: This page of the grimoire seems empty… but your fingers feel the grooves of an ancient quill. Words were traced with the ink of secrets — an ink that only a patient gaze can reveal. Pour your drops wisely: the revealing ink is not inexhaustible.
ink.tapInstruction: Touch a cell to pour ink
ink.victoryMessage: "now you know what you need to do..."
